name: Beef Stifado/cp
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the meat into 1-inch chunks.
2. Melt butter in a large frying pan; brown the meat.
3. Transfer the meat to a crockery pot.
4. Stir drained onions and brown sugar into the frying pan. Cook over medium-high heat, shaking the pan, until glazed.
5. Transfer the onions and brown sugar mixture to the crockery pot.
6. Add wine, water, tomato paste, and vinegar to the frying pan. Stir to loosen drippings.
7. Pour the liquid over the meat and onions in the crockery pot.
8. Place pickling spices and cloves in a tea ball or cheesecloth bag.
9. Add the spice mixture to the pot.
10. Season with garlic, salt, and pepper.
11. Cover and cook on LOW for 8 hours.
12. Thaw peas and add them during the last half hour of cooking.
13. Reduce juices slightly until desired consistency is reached.
14. Serve in ramekins. Makes 8 servings.
